# CodeCortex

> CodeCortex is a Rust-based code intelligence stack that indexes repositories into a graph database (Memgraph/Neo4j/Neptune), exposes 60 MCP tools to AI clients (Claude, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, Zed), and combines graph analysis with optional vector search for semantic and hybrid code retrieval.

## Summary

- **Language**: Rust (Apache 2.0)
- **MCP tools**: 60 tools across indexing, analysis, navigation, vector search, cross-project, memory, and review
- **Languages parsed**: Rust, Python, Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, C, C++, Java, PHP, Ruby, Kotlin, Swift, JSON, Shell (14 total)
- **Graph backends**: Memgraph (default), Neo4j, AWS Neptune
- **Vector backends**: LanceDB (embedded, default), Qdrant (production), JSON (simple)
- **Embedding providers**: OpenAI (`text-embedding-3-small`), Ollama (`nomic-embed-text`, `bge-m3`)
- **MCP transports**: stdio (default), HTTP-SSE, WebSocket, multi
- **Version**: 1.0.1

## Crate Reference

- [cortex-mcp — MCP server, 60 tools, feature flags](crates/cortex-mcp/README.md)
- [cortex-cli — CLI entrypoint, all commands](crates/cortex-cli/README.md)
- [cortex-core — Config, errors, models, EdgeKind](crates/cortex-core/README.md)
- [cortex-graph — Graph client, Cypher engine, bundle store](crates/cortex-graph/README.md)
- [cortex-parser — Tree-sitter parsing, 14 languages](crates/cortex-parser/README.md)
- [cortex-indexer — Repository scanning, incremental indexing](crates/cortex-indexer/README.md)
- [cortex-analyzer — Call graphs, smells, navigation, cross-project](crates/cortex-analyzer/README.md)
- [cortex-vector — Vector stores, embedders, hybrid search](crates/cortex-vector/README.md)
- [cortex-watcher — File watching, project registry, debouncing](crates/cortex-watcher/README.md)
- [cortex-pipeline — ECL pipeline (Extract→Cognify→Embed→Load)](crates/cortex-pipeline/README.md)

## Quick Start

```bash
docker run -d --name codecortex-memgraph -p 7687:7687 memgraph/memgraph-mage:3.8.1
cortex doctor && cortex index /path/to/repo && cortex mcp start
```

## MCP Client Config (Cursor / Claude Code)

```json
{ "mcpServers": { "codecortex": { "command": "cortex", "args": ["mcp", "start"] } } }
```
